name: Witch Amelia
short_description: "Witch Amelia" is about Rody who dreaming of becoming a hero and his childhood friend Amelia went on an adventure together. Both believe that their relationship and this feeling of happiness will last forever.
detailed_description:
"Witch Amelia" is an RPG game produced by Mousou Endemic and published by Hanabi games.

- Game plot
Dreaming of becoming a hero, Rody and his childhood friend Amelia went on an adventure together.

Both believe that their relationship and this feeling of happiness will last forever.

- Game content
This game is a role-playing type of game. Players will control the main character, Rody, improves his strength through constant exercise and strives to achieve his dream of being worthy of Amelia.

- Game Features
Jrpg
turn-based combat
Rich storyline
